attempts.superseded_reason: leak screen v1 rejects any single "/" as a path separator, including natural-language technical phrasing (parser/tokenizer, stdout/stderr). Fold-1 will be reset and re-run under a pre-registered path-aware leak screen v2; this v1 result is not mixed into the final sequence.

note: Historical, immutable log of OFFICIAL C-training attempts. An attempt is official iff the apparatus executed per the frozen contract (correct family, complete non-truncated response, valid+applied patch, correct public/hidden grading, write-gate invoked); the write-gate accepting a lesson is NOT required. Attempts run under a superseded apparatus_version are retained here but are NOT part of the final experimental sequence.
